rag_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component names, ports, directions, data types, subcomponents, and connections as the input AADL model
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are properly scoped within the AADL architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports in implementation scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
